no: Replaces area TIS/PVRZ files via a custom macro (COPY_TIS_PVRZ_BGGO) that remaps PVRZ indices to avoid collisions, then COPYs to override. Covers 58 BG1 areas (BG0xxx/BG1xxx EET names = AR0xxx BGEE names) and 6 BG2 areas (AR1102, AR1700, AR1900, AR5000, AR5200, AR6100). CONFLICT with BGEE_AI_Denoised_Areas (i=519): all 58 BGGO BG1 areas are also covered by AI Denoised (329 TIS total) — whichever installs later wins. CONFLICT with BG2EE_AI_Denoised_Areas (i=520): all 6 BGGO BG2 areas are also covered — whichever installs later wins. In infinity-insanity preset, BGGO installs at position 52 and AI Denoised at 1607/1608, so AI Denoised overwrites BGGO for all overlapping areas. Do not use BGGO and AI Denoised together. NO conflict with SotSC/DSotSC/NToSC/1PP (different area codes or file types). BUG: door_functions.tpa has ext mismatch — CreateDoorScriptPatchAnimation always creates .baf in workspace, but Door_trigger_script_patch sets ext=bcs when Door0157.bcs already exists in game (e.g. from a prior install attempt). EXTEND_BOTTOM then looks for .bcs in workspace and fails. Reproducible after any partial install leaves Door0157.bcs in override. Filed: Spellhold Studios GitHub.
ic: BG2EE_AI_Denoised_Areas (i=520), BGEE_AI_Denoised_Areas (i=519) - both replace the same TIS/PVRZ area files; last installer wins, use one or the other

ki.description: BGGO may crash (0xc0000005) during installation due to heavy file operations on area graphics. Transient — usually succeeds on retry.
ki.workaround: Retry the install. If persistent, ensure no antivirus is scanning the game directory.

conflicts.reason: Reported incompatible by LCC-docs database (lcc id 146 vs 123)
Reported incompatible by LCC-docs database (lcc id 146 vs 126)

sum: AI-upscaled area backgrounds and character sprites that sharpen the game's visuals at higher resolutions. Large download but purely cosmetic.
